title: Origins Immersion: Phantom
description: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Phantom-y hearts to better fit the Phantom origin in the Origins mod. I am not formally associated with the mod or modmaker(s).
body: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Phantom-y hearts to better fit the Phantom origin in the Origins mod. I am not formally associated with the mod or modmaker(s).
